definition: APP/PS1deltaE9 transgenic mouse model of Alzheimer's disease expressing mutant human amyloid precursor protein and presenilin 1
A synthetic RXR agonist used to activate retinoid X receptors
Retinoid X Receptor - a nuclear receptor that functions as a heterodimer partner for other nuclear receptors to regulate gene transcription
Single-nucleus Assay for Transposase-Accessible Chromatin using sequencing - measures chromatin accessibility at single-nucleus resolution
Single-cell RNA sequencing - measures gene expression at single-cell resolution
Chromatin immunoprecipitation followed by sequencing - identifies genome-wide binding sites of a protein of interest
Computational analysis of ATAC-seq data to infer transcription factor binding events based on protected chromatin regions within accessible peaks
A computational method for inferring transcription-factor-associated accessibility from single-cell epigenomic data
A module within the TOBIAS pipeline that estimates bound motif sites and differential motif scores between conditions
Transcription factor Occupancy prediction By Investigation of ATAC-seq Signal - a computational framework for TF footprinting analysis
Cis-regulatory element - a non-coding DNA region that regulates transcription of nearby genes
Transcription start site - the genomic position where transcription of a gene begins
Liver X Receptor (NR1H3) - a nuclear receptor that heterodimerizes with RXR to regulate lipid metabolism genes
